# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong no auth.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "2.1"

services:
  - name: service-1
    url: http://service-1:8080
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/v1/service-1

  - name: service-2
    url: http://service-2:8080
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/v1/service-2

upstreams:
  - name: upstream-service-1
    targets:
      - target: service-1:8080
        weight: 1

  - name: upstream-service-2
    targets:
      - target: service-2:8080
        weight: 1

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 1000

  - name: key-auth

consumers:
  - username: consumer-1
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key: "consumer-1-key"

routes:
  - paths:
      - /api/v1/service-1
    service: service-1
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500

  - paths:
      - /api/v1/service-2
    service: service-2
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 750
